name: Azure AI Content Safety
pricing_notes: Free tier: 5K transactions/mo; S0: $1/1K text transactions (5K chars), $1.50/1K image transactions

auth.notes: Azure subscription + Content Safety resource key + endpoint

performance.notes: Azure regional endpoints; near-region calls ~200ms; inter-region 300-600ms

agent_readiness.notes: Text + image moderation. Categories: hate, self-harm, sexual, violence with severity scores (0-6). Prompt shields for jailbreak/indirect attack detection. Groundedness detection. Custom categories. Enterprise SLA.

gotchas: Azure subscription required — adds friction for non-Azure shops
Severity thresholds (0-6) require tuning for your use case
Custom categories require training data and are slow to update
Batch API has size limits and separate pricing
Prompt shields (jailbreak detection) is separate from content filtering
best_when: Enterprise applications requiring SOC2/HIPAA-compliant content filtering
Agents exposed to untrusted user input (prompt injection protection via Prompt Shields)
Multi-category content moderation (hate + violence + sexual + self-harm in one API)
summary: Azure AI Content Safety provides enterprise-grade text and image moderation with severity scoring across hate, violence, sexual, and self-harm categories. Includes Prompt Shields for jailbreak and indirect prompt injection detection — particularly valuable for agent inputs. Best choice for Azure ecosystem teams; strong enterprise compliance posture with SOC2/HIPAA.
